title: cullen australasicum
intro: Cullen australasicum, commonly known as Australian swamp pepper, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in Australian medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits. The therapeutic actions of Cullen australasicum include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its potential in wound healing and infection prevention. The bioactive constituents of this plant include limonoids, coumarins, and other compounds that contribute to its medicinal properties.
